chunks.title: Some Amazing Python Programs - The Power of Python
chunks.text: Welcome back to 100 days of code  Today I want to tell you a story of my personal life  When I was in my second year of college, I knew C C++ very well  I was coding, I knew coding, I knew HTML  But I was not able to work in the industry in any way

chunks.title: Some Amazing Python Programs - The Power of Python
chunks.text: Maybe I was not getting any C C++ project  Now I am not saying that C C++ is a bad programming language  I have made many conditional related programs with the help of C++  I have done many other things, made great calculators  But I was not able to work in the industry in any way

chunks.title: Some Amazing Python Programs - The Power of Python
chunks.text: When I was introduced to Python, I did web scrapping, made GUIs, made applications for Flask  I did a lot of freelancing  And I consider Python as a language that actually taught me the use of programming  Why do we give so much value to programming in the industry?  And why is programming used so much in the industry?

chunks.title: Some Amazing Python Programs - The Power of Python
chunks.text: In today's video, I am going to show you some programs that you will enjoy watching  You will also say that it is fun to watch these programs  Because after watching these programs, you will understand the actual use of programming  Programming is used  I will tell you about 5 programs today

chunks.text: And you will also enjoy watching these 5 programs  Some of them are very amazing games  There is a Jarvis virtual assistant that runs on your map  It shows you what you say and what commands you give  The biggest reason to make this course is that there are many new things in Python

chunks.text: You give it a command and it basically completes the task  The next program I want to show you is our love calculator  It is a very amazing calculator  Which tells how much love there is between two people  Now obviously, it will not tell accurately

chunks.text: How much love there is between you and your partner  So you all know  But in a fun way, we made this program using a random module  In which if we put two names  Then it will tell the love percentage
